title: Assistant Relationship Manager
description:
Company Overview

Look Capital is a regulated and established multi-family office with a Capital Market Services license in Singapore. We are committed to serving Asian tech elites. Leveraging technology to empower finance, we provide our clients with a one-stop solution including global asset allocation, overseas financial and legal infrastructure setup, as well as cutting-edge industry research.

Position Overview

LOOK CAPITAL is seeking an Assistant Relationship Manager to join our Middle Office team, providing comprehensive support to the team across client onboarding, trade execution support, and ongoing operational and client service activities.

The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, execution-focused, and comfortable operating in a fast-paced financial services environment. Prior experience in private banking, wealth management, or asset management-related functions is highly valued.

Key Responsibilities

  1. Support client onboarding processes, including preparation, review, and follow-up of account opening and KYC documentation.
  2. Provide middle office support for trade execution, including coordination with counterparties, internal teams, and post-trade follow-up.
  3. Handle day-to-day operational and client service matters, including account maintenance and service requests.
  4. Coordinate across internal teams and external service providers to ensure smooth execution.
  5. Maintain accurate client data and internal records, and support basic reporting as required.
  6. Assist in client-related activities or events when needed.

Qualifications

  1. Bachelor’s degree or above, preferably in Finance, Economics, Business, International Trade, or related fields.
  2. Strong banking acumen and professional ethics, prior experience in Private Banking is highly preferred.
  3. Candidates without direct Private Banking experience will also be considered if they have relevant exposure within Priority Banking, Wealth Management, or Asset Management-related functions (e.g. client servicing, investment support, or operations within banking or financial institutions).
  4. Fluent in both Chinese and English is required in order to process documents and liaise with counterparties in both languages.
  5. Effective communication and coordination skills.
  6. Highly meticulous and patient, capable of carefully checking and verifying materials to ensure the accuracy and completeness of documents.
  7. Accountability of own work, proactively solving problems, and maintaining high work efficiency.
  8. Experience in similar capacity or finance industry is preferred.

LOOK CAPITAL is an equal opportunity employer. All applicants will be considered regardless of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, veteran, or disability status.
